title: coverageTickHistory
description: Returns Coverage Response of the requested ticker with unique isocode within a date range

ticker.description: a unique ticker given to a company

startDate.description: The date for (or from which) the coverage is required.

latestTradeDate.description: This specifies the latest traded date from tick history.

isin.description: returns the ISIN of the requested company

currency.description: Represents 3 digit ISO code for the currency

lastExchangeCode.description: the last traded exhange code from tick history

lastExchangeName.description: the last traded exchange name from tick history
